name: denario
description: Denario multi-agent research assistant over MCP: drive the end-to-end pipeline (setup -> idea -> literature -> methods -> results -> evaluate/iterate -> paper -> classify/publish) through the denario MCP tools, configure per-role/multi-provider models and the VLM image-reviewer via params.yaml, and run/resume the cmbagent_lg analysis engine (plan/execute/restart). Bundles both MCP servers (denario, cmbagent_lg) via env-var-configured registration.
